title: New NGE Project in Young Ace
display_title: New NGE Project in Young Ace
wikitext:
[]: New NGE Project in Young Ace             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Mar 02, 2013 4:33 pm http://www.evageeks.org/2013/03/new-neon-genesis-evangelion-project/

[]:             Quote Post by Elect G-Max » Sat Mar 02, 2013 5:19 pm I predict that it will be a shitty manga based on an even shittier dating sim game.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sat Mar 02, 2013 5:29 pm Elect G-Max wrote: I predict that it will be a shitty manga based on an even shittier dating sim game.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Sat Mar 02, 2013 6:07 pm It will probably be about that stuff that I can't mention because of spoilers.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sat Mar 02, 2013 7:40 pm So if it comes out on March 4 in Japan, that'd be tomorrow for North America right?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Mar 02, 2013 7:52 pm hui43210 wrote: So if it comes out on March 4 in Japan, that'd be tomorrow for North America right?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 02, 2013 7:59 pm It'll be based on that Eva rhythm game. I just know it.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Sat Mar 02, 2013 8:02 pm A.T. Fish wrote: It will probably be about that stuff that I can't mention because of spoilers.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sat Mar 02, 2013 10:11 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: The image in the article is the March 4th announcement. No more details until a month from then for the next issue.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Mar 02, 2013 10:27 pm Anything less shitty than Detective Journal would be a step in the right direction.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sat Mar 02, 2013 11:22 pm I have the feeling that it might be something like ISRP, but using the Rebuild world and characters instead. I can imagine stories along the line of what shennigans Mari gets involved in this time.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sat Mar 02, 2013 11:57 pm cyharding wrote: I have the feeling that it might be something like ISRP, but using the Rebuild world and characters instead. I can imagine stories along the line of what shennigans Mari gets involved in this time.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sun Mar 03, 2013 12:41 am Q Spoiler hui43210 wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Sun Mar 03, 2013 1:11 am My guess it will be one of those manga spinoffs where they do like the same story with the same characters, but super condensed and put in a different time period or something.

[]:             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Sun Mar 03, 2013 1:24 am Elect G-Max wrote: I predict that it will be a shitty manga based on an even shittier dating sim game.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaworu06 » Sun Mar 03, 2013 7:30 am I'll take a Kaworu Spin off if it has KXA .

[]:             Quote Post by Pomme » Sun Mar 03, 2013 1:33 pm Why not a official NGE manga ? Maybe Rebuild ? Or Anima ? I hope they won't release a shitty harem like usually...

[]:             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Sun Mar 03, 2013 1:52 pm Pomme wrote: Why not a official NGE manga ? Maybe Rebuild ? Or Anima ? I hope they won't release a shitty harem like usually...

[]:             Quote Post by Elect G-Max » Sun Mar 03, 2013 2:12 pm SimplyMason0 wrote: They haven't made a manga based on the Ayanami Raising Project yet.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Mar 03, 2013 4:23 pm Elect G-Max wrote: I demand an explanation for this.
